code_dossier.name: SendEmailRequest.java
code_dossier.description: A Data Transfer Object (DTO) that encapsulates email sending request parameters for third-party email service integration. It defines the essential fields required to compose and send an email including recipient, subject, and body content.

data.detailed_description:
SendEmailRequest is a simple yet essential Data Transfer Object (DTO) class located in the third-party API module of the system. It serves as the contract for email sending operations, defining the minimum required information to dispatch an email through the third-party email service.

The class leverages Lombok's @Data annotation to automatically generate boilerplate code including getters, setters, toString(), equals(), hashCode(), and a default constructor. This approach promotes clean, maintainable code by reducing verbosity.

The DTO contains three string fields:
1. `to` - The recipient's email address
2. `theme` - The email subject line (note: unconventional naming, typically called "subject")
3. `content` - The email body content

This class acts as an API contract between service consumers and the email sending functionality, ensuring a standardized data structure for email requests across the system. Its placement in the `dto` package under `thirdpartyapi` indicates it's designed to be shared across module boundaries as part of the public API contract.
responsibilities: Define the data structure for email sending requests in a standardized format
Serve as an API contract between email service consumers and providers
Encapsulate email parameters (recipient, subject, content) for data transfer
Provide a clean interface for email request serialization/deserialization

interfaces.name: SendEmailRequest
interfaces.description: DTO class representing an email sending request with recipient, theme, and content fields. Auto-generates accessors via Lombok @Data annotation.
